heading: Applicability of this subchapter
label: 828c Applicability of this subchapter
text: Except as herein provided, the provisions of this subchapter shall not be construed as repealing or affecting any of the provisions of the Federal Power Act [ et seq.].16 U.S.C. 791a
notes: References in TextThe Federal Power Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act June 10, 1920, ch. 28541 Stat. 1063section 791a of this title
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Federal Power Act which generally comprises this chapter.
